final_text:
Thermal diffusivity has units of m²/s, so P-2.  
Fracture toughness has units of N·m⁻³/², so Q-4.  
Surface energy has units of J/m², so R-5.  
Magnetic permeability has units of H/m, so S-1.  

The correct match is P-2, Q-4, R-5, S-1, which corresponds to option (B).

[ANSWER]B[/ANSWER]
